<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Runner; use const PHP_EOL; use function getmypid; use function register_shutdown_function; use function rtrim; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class ShutdownHandler { private static bool $registered = false; private static string $message = ''; public static function setMessage(string $message): void { self::register(); self::$message = $message; } public static function resetMessage(): void { self::$message = ''; } private static function register(): void { if (self::$registered) { return; } self::$registered = true; $pid = getmypid(); register_shutdown_function( static function () use ($pid): void { $message = rtrim(self::$message); if ($message === '' || $pid !== getmypid()) { return; } print $message . PHP_EOL; }, ); } }
